title: Stretcherz Mini Stretch Squad 20 Pack Fidget Toys Set | Stress Relief, Anxiety Relief & Calming Squishy Fidget Toy | Sensory Toy Playset | Party Bag Fillers For Birthday, Parties, Schools | 3+
features: COLLECTIBLE 20‑PACK MINI STRETCH SQUAD FIGURES – Stock up with the Stretcherz Mini Stretch Squad 20 Pack, featuring 20 individually packaged mini collectible figures. With up to 16 unique characters—including shark, octopus, and monster designs—this bundle is ideal for collections, party favours, or classroom rewards.

SUPER STRETCHY FIDGET TOYS FOR SENSORY PLAY – Each mini figure stretches to 3× its original size before snapping shape-back, offering satisfying tactile and visual stimulation. Perfect for sensory seekers and fidgeters, these mini stretchy toys help calm anxiety, improve concentration, and support mindful play.

DURABLE, NON‑TOXIC MATERIALS FOR SAFE PLAY – Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free, non-toxic materials, these minis are designed to withstand repeated stretching and squeezing without tearing or breaking. Safe for children aged 3+, they're built tough for long-lasting durability during active play sessions.

PERFECT FOR PARTY BAGS, FAVOURS & GIFTS – This 20-pack provides a budget-friendly set of fun, neon-coloured mini stretch figures ideal as party bag fillers, classroom prizes, or holiday stocking stuffers. With diverse styles to collect and share, kids enjoy surprise discoveries and interactive play.

SCREEN-FREE ENTERTAINMENT & COLLECTIBLE FUN – Ditch the screens with these adorable mini figures that kids love to stretch, swap, and showcase. Each figure’s random design adds collectible excitement, perfect for encouraging social play, imaginative storytelling, and tactile engagement.
